pack:review-depth: Report Critical and High findings always. Additionally flag: hardcoded secrets or tokens, overly broad IAM permissions, missing rollback procedures, unencrypted secrets in environment variables or pipeline definitions, container images without pinned digests, and any change that could cause a production outage with no safe recovery path. Report Medium and lower only when actionable.
pack:scope-discipline: Address the stated request fully. For any change that touches CI/CD pipelines, infrastructure definitions, Dockerfiles, or deployment scripts: verify it does not introduce a new secret-exposure surface, privilege-escalation path, or unrecoverable deployment state. Flag these proactively even if not asked.
